title: dianthus caucaseus
intro: Dianthus caucaseus, also known as Caucasus pink or mountain pink, is a flowering plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Dianthus caucaseus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Dianthus caucaseus can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
